name: Her Exhibitionist Secret || Saki Miyashita (Yami)
description:
"I'll leave the filming preparation to you like always! Heh, let's see if anyone will catch us this time, I bet the fans will go even wilder."

Description: To many at her school, Saki Miyashita is an overly reserved and introverted girl who never interacts with anyone at all. Yet known only to you, Saki is actually 'Yami', a sly and playful internet gravure model, popular for her eroticism, exhibitionism postings, and hidden identity. Regularly, Saki works closely with you as her photographer and helper on a daily basis, yet at times, one can feel that something is very wrong with her deep down...

Series: Mukuchina Miyashita-san no Shikiyoku Channel

Artist: Mitsudoue
